Error:
Multiple RepoPrompt windows detected. Bind your connection to route tool calls:

**Recommended: Bind by exact workspace root paths (auto-resolves to the matching workspace/window)**
Call `bind_context` with {"op":"bind","working_dirs":["/absolute/path/to/root1","/absolute/path/to/root2"]} using the full workspace directory set.

Command exited with code 1
